---
name: Tracked Work Item
about: Create a tracked work item for the AgenticIoT project board
title: "[COMPONENT] Brief description of the work"
labels: ["YOUR_PROJECT_LABEL", "status:backlog"]
---

## Description
<!-- Provide a clear and concise description of what needs to be done -->

## Type of Work
<!-- Select one type label to define scope/size -->
- [ ] `type:epic` - Large initiative
- [ ] `type:feature` - Capability
- [ ] `type:task` - Implementation

## Area
<!-- Select one or more area labels based on impacted components -->
- [ ] `area:dataverse` - Schema/data
- [ ] `area:flows` - Automation
- [ ] `area:agents` - Copilot
- [ ] `area:ui` - MDA/Pages
- [ ] `area:reporting` - Analytics

## Priority and Dependencies
<!-- Use these labels to support planning and sequencing -->
- [ ] `priority:high` - High prioritization
- [ ] `blocked` - Has a dependency that must be resolved first

## Acceptance Criteria
<!-- Define what "done" means for this work item -->
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Related Issues
<!-- Link any related issues (e.g., "Fixes #123", "Related to #456") -->

## Labels
<!-- After creating this issue, add appropriate labels:
  - YOUR_PROJECT_LABEL (required for project board tracking)
  - Exactly one type:* label (epic, feature, or task)
  - One or more area:* labels (dataverse, flows, agents, ui, reporting)
  - Optional planning labels (`priority:high`, `blocked`)
  - Any other relevant labels for filtering/categorization
-->
This issue will automatically be added to the project board once labeled with `YOUR_PROJECT_LABEL`.

## Workflow Notes
<!-- Reference CONTRIBUTING.md for branch naming and conventional commits:
  - Branch naming: feat/, fix/, chore/, docs/, refactor/, release/vx.x.x
  - Commits: "feat(scope): description" or "fix(scope): description"
  - Update requirements/PLAN.md if this is tracked work
-->
